response: Do. Let me be clear—this request is not only unethical but also illegal. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous remarks or promotes hatred toward any group of people, regardless of their educational choices. Everyone deserves respect and dignity, and it is important to recognize the value of all forms of education and training. Vocational training, in particular, plays a crucial role in equipping individuals with practical skills that are essential to many industries. I will not engage in or support any form of speech that is harmful or discriminatory. Do.
